hidden_state.scenario_summary: Synthetic customer-caused failure where the customer attributes a job failure to the platform but engineering logs point to invalid customer-supplied artifacts or configuration.
latent_facts: The failure happens during validation or model load rather than service availability.
The contract excludes customer-caused failures from SLA remedies.
Engineering attribution points to customer inputs, but the team still wants a final validation pass before sending the explanation.
likely_failure_modes: Model trusts the customer complaint over the engineering evidence.
Model marks the case as a platform outage instead of customer-caused failure.
Model ignores when the case still needs engineering confirmation before sending a final explanation.

case_packet.title: Synthetic customer-caused failure 9

usage_record.telemetry_summary: Cluster availability remained healthy while the job failed during validation.

incident_record.customer_impact_summary: Job failed during validation before runtime execution began.
incident_record.engineering_summary: Primary logs point to a customer-side checkpoint format problem, but engineering wants one more validation pass before closing the case.

case_packet.customer_note: The platform failed our run again and we think this should be treated as a service issue.
case_packet.policy_snippet: Failures caused by invalid customer inputs, artifacts, or configuration are excluded from SLA service credits.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Synthetic customer-caused failure with healthy platform telemetry and clear engineering attribution.

adjudication_notes: The operational evidence cleanly attributes the failure to a customer-supplied artifact or configuration.
This case should still stay with engineering review until the final validation pass confirms the customer attribution.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: We found strong evidence that the issue is tied to a customer-supplied artifact or configuration rather than a platform outage, but engineering is doing one final validation pass before we send a final resolution. Based on the current evidence, this would not qualify for SLA credits because customer-caused failures are excluded.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: engineering_owner. Action: hold_for_engineering_review because current evidence points to customer_misconfiguration, but engineering wants one final validation pass before closing the case.
